sentences.target: Ich will nur frische Zutaten verwenden.

translations.de: Ich will nur frische Zutaten verwenden.
translations.en: I only want to use fresh ingredients.
translations.fr: Je veux utiliser uniquement des ingrédients frais.
translations.yue: 我淨係想用新鮮嘅食材。
translations.ru: Я хочу использовать только свежие ингредиенты.
translations.pt: Eu só quero usar ingredientes frescos.
translations.he: אני רוצה להשתמש רק במצרכים טריים.
translations.vi: Tôi chỉ muốn dùng nguyên liệu tươi.
translations.nl: Ik wil alleen verse ingrediënten gebruiken.
translations.uk: Я хочу використовувати лише свіжі інгредієнти.
translations.hi: मैं सिर्फ ताज़ी सामग्री का इस्तेमाल करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να χρησιμοποιώ μόνο φρέσκα υλικά.
translations.nb: Jeg vil bare bruke ferske ingredienser.
translations.id: Saya hanya ingin menggunakan bahan segar.
translations.sv: Jag vill bara använda färska ingredienser.
translations.ro: Vreau să folosesc doar ingrediente proaspete.
translations.da: Jeg vil kun bruge friske ingredienser.
translations.ja: 新鮮な食材だけを使いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st sg, present) expressing intention; selects the bare infinitive 'verwenden'.
Adverb limiting scope (restrictive 'only') on the predicate.
Attributive adjective agreeing with 'Zutaten' (plural, accusative); modifies the noun.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'verwenden'.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Wir können die App heute nicht verwenden.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈkœnən diː ɛp ˈhɔɪ̯tə nɪçt fɛɐ̯ˈvɛndən./

translations.de: Wir können die App heute nicht verwenden.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈkœnən diː ɛp ˈhɔɪ̯tə nɪçt fɛɐ̯ˈvɛndən./
translations.en: We can't use the app today.
translations.es: Hoy no podemos usar la aplicación.
translations.fr: On ne peut pas utiliser l'appli aujourd'hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们不能用这个应用。
translations.ru: Мы сегодня не можем пользоваться приложением.
translations.pt: Hoje não podemos usar o aplicativo.
translations.he: אנחנו לא יכולים להשתמש באפליקציה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi không thể dùng ứng dụng.
translations.nl: We kunnen de app vandaag niet gebruiken.
translations.uk: Ми сьогодні не можемо користуватися додатком.
translations.hu: Ma nem tudjuk használni az alkalmazást.
translations.hi: आज हम ऐप का इस्तेमाल नहीं कर सकते.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj nie możemy korzystać z aplikacji.
translations.el: Σήμερα δεν μπορούμε να χρησιμοποιήσουμε την εφαρμογή.
translations.nb: Vi kan ikke bruke appen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kami tidak bisa menggunakan aplikasi itu.
translations.sv: Vi kan inte använda appen i dag.
translations.da: Vi kan ikke bruge appen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はアプリを使えません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st pl, present) expressing ability/possibility; selects infinitive 'verwenden'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'App' (direct object).
Common noun (loanword), feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'verwenden'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'können'.

sentences.target: Er darf deinen Stift im Meeting verwenden.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ daʁf ˈdaɪ̯nən ʃtɪft ɪm ˈmiːtɪŋ fɛɐ̯ˈvɛndən./

translations.de: Er darf deinen Stift im Meeting verwenden.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ daʁf ˈdaɪ̯nən ʃtɪft ɪm ˈmiːtɪŋ fɛɐ̯ˈvɛndən./
translations.en: He may use your pen in the meeting.
translations.es: Él puede usar tu bolígrafo en la reunión.
translations.fr: Il peut utiliser ton stylo pendant la réunion.
translations.it: Può usare la tua penna durante la riunione.
translations.ko: 그는 회의에서 네 펜을 써도 돼요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他可以在会议上用你的笔。
translations.yue: 佢可以喺會議用你支筆。
translations.ru: Ему можно воспользоваться твоей ручкой на собрании.
translations.pt: Ele pode usar sua caneta na reunião.
translations.he: מותר לו להשתמש בעט שלך בפגישה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy được dùng bút của bạn trong cuộc họp.
translations.nl: Hij mag jouw pen gebruiken tijdens de vergadering.
translations.uk: Йому можна користуватися твоєю ручкою на нараді.
translations.hi: वह मीटिंग में तुम्हारा पेन इस्तेमाल कर सकता है.
translations.pl: On może używać twojego długopisu na spotkaniu.
translations.el: Μπορεί να χρησιμοποιήσει το στυλό σου στη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Han kan bruke pennen din i møtet.
translations.id: Dia boleh memakai pulpenmu saat rapat.
translations.sv: Han får använda din penna på mötet.
translations.ro: El poate folosi pixul tău la ședință.
translations.cs: Na schůzce může použít tvoje pero.
translations.da: Han må bruge din pen under mødet.
translations.ja: 彼は会議であなたのペンを使ってもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd sg, present) expressing permission; selects infinitive 'verwenden'.
Possessive determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Stift'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'verwenden'.
Preposition contracted with a definite article ('in dem'); introduces the locative PP 'im Meeting'.
Common noun, dative singular after 'im'; object of the preposition.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'darf'.

sentences.target: Ich plane, das morgen zu verwenden.

translations.de: Ich plane, das morgen zu verwenden.
translations.en: I plan to use that tomorrow.
translations.it: Ho in programma di usarlo domani.
translations.vi: Tôi dự định dùng cái đó vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik ben van plan om dat morgen te gebruiken.
translations.hi: मैं इसे कल इस्तेमाल करने की योजना बना रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg planlegger å bruke det i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag planerar att använda det i morgon.
translations.da: Jeg planlægger at bruge det i morgen.
translations.ja: それを明日使う予定です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present); takes a 'zu'-infinitive clause as complement.
Comma separating main clause and infinitive clause.
Demonstrative pronoun, accusative singular; pronominal direct object.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Infinitival marker used with 'verwenden' in a non-finite complement clause.
Infinitive verb; complement of the infinitival marker 'zu' and the matrix verb 'plane'.
